Follow the instructions in [btw skill](../skills/btw/SKILL.md).
For repository-specific questions, read available product-owned context first: `README.md`, `docs/agent-context.md`, `docs/codebase-snapshot.md`, `docs/plans/`, and `docs/solutions/`.
